name: Bread Upma Recipe

ingredients.name: bread cubes
ingredients.notes: or 5 to 6 bread slices chopped in cubes

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: finely chopped or ¾ to 1 inch ginger

steps.instruction: Chop the bread slices in cubes. Finely chop the onions, green chilli, ginger, tomatoes, curry leaves and coriander leaves.
Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard seeds and let them crackle and pop.
Then add cumin seeds. Stir and saute till the cumin seeds also crackle.
Add chopped onions. Saute till they turn translucent.
Add finely chopped green chilies, finely chopped ginger and chopped curry leaves.
Then add finely chopped tomatoes. Add turmeric powder, red chili powder and a pinch of asafoetida (optional).
Stir and saute this onion-tomato-spices mixture till the tomatoes soften and you see oil releasing from the sides.
Add the bread cubes. Mix the bread well with the rest of the mixture.
On a low to medium flame, saute the bread cubes for 4 to 5 minutes till they become slightly crisp from the edges.
Then add chopped coriander leaves. Mix and serve bread upma hot.

tips: Use any variety of soft bread. Pav (dinner rolls) also works well.
Better health option would be whole wheat bread, multi grain or ragi bread.
Reduce or increase spices according to taste.
Add some roasted cashews or roasted peanuts for crunch.
variations: Add other veggies like capsicum, carrots etc.
